products.name: Series 1585 Thrust Stand
products.descriptor: Compact UAV motor/propeller thrust stand measuring up to 5 kgf and 2 Nm

evidence.snippet:
The **Series 1585** is a thrust stand for designers of UAVs, drones and other propulsion systems using brushless motors. It features a USB interface and powerful software for automated control and data-logging.
The Series 1585 is an updated version of the Series 1580 thrust stand.

evidence.snippet:
Flight Stand 15

####
Includes powerful software for testing up to 8 motors and propellers simultaneously.

unresolved_questions: Propeller Testing Station dedicated page (resource-0012) was skipped due to budget; only homepage snippet was available — descriptor and configuration details may be richer on that page.
Flight Stand Software dedicated page (resource-0014, /pages/software-landing) was skipped; pricing, versioning, and standalone availability unclear.

RCbenchmark Software dedicated page (resource-0015, /pages/rcbenchmark-software) was skipped; relationship between RCbenchmark Software and Flight Stand Software (whether they are separate products or one has superseded the other) is not fully clear from fetched pages.
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance claims found anywhere in the corpus; all products remain unknown on both dimensions.

fetch_requests.reason: Dedicated product page for Propeller Testing Station was skipped; needed to confirm full product spec, configurations, and pricing mode.
Dedicated page for Flight Stand Software; would clarify features, versioning, and whether it is sold separately from hardware.
Dedicated page for RCbenchmark Software; would confirm it is a distinct product from Flight Stand Software and clarify its scope and availability.
